description.zh-Hans: 绘制填充或描边矩形，支持可选的圆角。
description.en: Draws a filled or stroked rectangle with optional rounded corners.

triggers.zh-Hans: 矩形, 画矩形, 圆角矩形, 填充矩形, 描边矩形
triggers.en: rectangle, draw rectangle, rounded rect, filled rect, stroked rect

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 在输入缓冲区上绘制带圆角的填充矩形，用作UI元素或窗口。
exampleUsage.en: Draw a filled rectangle with rounded corners on an input buffer for UI elements or windows.
